hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; if [[ "$f" =~ \.(ts|tsx|js|json|mdc)$ ]]; then echo "[clodbridge] Linting $f..."; bun run lint "$f" 2>&1 || true; fi; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; if [[ "$f" =~ \.(ts|tsx|test\.ts)$ ]]; then echo "[clodbridge] Running tests..."; bun test 2>&1 | grep -E '(pass|fail|error|Exit)' || true; fi; }
